title: Spacebomb Records
summary: Spacebomb Records is an independent record label based in Richmond, Virginia, co-founded by Matthew E. White in 2012. The label has released notable albums by Matthew E. White, Natalie Prass, and Bedouine. The label's first release, White's own Big Inner, garnered widespread attention and propelled the label to international recognition.
text:
Spacebomb Records is an independent record label based in Richmond, Virginia, co-founded by Matthew E. White in 2012. The label has released notable albums by Matthew E. White, Natalie Prass, and Bedouine. The label's first release, White's own Big Inner, garnered widespread attention and propelled the label to international recognition.
